ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_native_id" TEXT /* Native ID of the site as per local jurisdiction */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the site */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the site's location */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the site is located */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., public supply, municipal irrigation) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the site information was updated */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the site (e.g., phone, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_uuid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_usage_data" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water usage record */,
  "site_uuid" TEXT /* Reference to the site where the usage data was collected */,
  "variable_cv" TEXT /* Variable code for the type of water data (e.g., produced, delivered) */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step for the data (e.g., monthly) */,
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage type */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of water used */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the volume (e.g., gallons, liters) */,
  "count_var" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences for the variable */,
  "min_time_frame_start" TEXT /* Start date of the minimum time frame for data collection */,
  "max_time_frame_end" TEXT /* End date of the maximum time frame for data collection */,
  "min_population_served" INTEGER /* Minimum population served by the site */,
  "max_population_served" INTEGER /* Maximum population served by the site */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., meter reading, estimate) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the usage data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_data_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_data_usage_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_type_id") REFERENCES usage_types ("usage_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_data_site_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("site_uuid") REFERENCES sites ("site_uuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_cv" TEXT /* Variable code for water usage (e.g., produced, delivered) */,
  "waDE_name" TEXT /* WaDE name associated with the variable */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., gallons, liters) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., meter reading, estimate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_steps" (
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time step */,
  "time_step" TEXT /* Description of the time step (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the time step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations_served" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "site_uuid" TEXT /* Reference to the site */,
  "min_population_served" INTEGER /* Minimum population served */,
  "max_population_served" INTEGER /* Maximum population served */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the population data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_populations_served_site_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("site_uuid") REFERENCES sites ("site_uuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter state code (e.g., CA) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located (e.g., West, East) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_types" (
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage type */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Description of the usage type (e.g., produced, delivered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the usage type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geometry_data" (
  "geometry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geometry entry */,
  "site_uuid" TEXT /* Reference to the site */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the site */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the geometry data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geometry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geometry_data_site_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("site_uuid") REFERENCES sites ("site_uuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser type) of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES water_usage_data ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., water manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last time the user changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
